message:
fix(elasticsearch): propagate bulk serialization errors instead of swallowing

The bulk() method used unwrap_or_default() on serde_json::to_string(),
silently replacing failed serializations with empty lines in the NDJSON
payload. This could corrupt bulk requests. Now propagates the error via
the existing ElasticsearchError::Json variant.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
